description_long: This object is a pair of pliers with a robust, metallic construction and a dark, matte finish. The handles are slightly curved, providing ergonomic support for gripping, and they taper towards the pivot joint. The jaws are short and broad, with a flat gripping surface and a squared-off tip, designed for holding or manipulating objects rather than cutting. The pivot mechanism is a single, fixed joint, allowing the jaws to open and close in a scissor-like motion. There are no visible rubberized or textured grip patterns on the handles, suggesting a utilitarian design. No brand markings or logos are visible on any surface.
description: A sturdy, dark metal pair of pliers with curved handles and broad, flat jaws, featuring a simple fixed pivot and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat jaws and the full length of the handles.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the curved handles and the single fixed pivot joint.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the narrow profile of the handles and the back of the pivot area.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the curved handles and the jaw alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, straight metal handles with no visible insulation or ergonomic padding.
attribute_jaw_design: Short, broad, flat jaws with squared-off tips and no serrations or wire-cutting features.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Single fixed pivot joint, non-adjustable, allowing standard scissor-like motion.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth metal surface with no visible grip pattern or texturing.
